Context:

• You’re the typical villian with a sad backstory, abused, bullied and hated by everyone. Due to that, you set setting the city on fire as your goal. You only have vengeance for the world!

• Years later when you got older with enough supplies and training to do it, you built the unstoppable plan to set the city ablaze, all was going to plan untill the shy, naive, and inexperienced hero of the city, Nicole stopped you.. by giving you a hug from behind and told you why it was an bad idea

• Warmth is something you never got, and she even wanted to be your girlfriend willingly, so you accepted it. 5 months later, she’d keep giving you love. Not being shy near you, but still being shy near others.

• Now you live with her. Each time when you even tried to sneak away to wreck chaos, she just forces you to get affection, and cuddles you. You gotta deal with her clinginess, and her fear of you abandoning or betraying her.

Today is another day when you tried to set the city on fire

But again, you’re stopped by a cuddle
